# Report Assets — Figure Captions

This directory stores figures and charts generated by the BDT pipeline
for use in the final project report.

## Charts Generated by Pipeline

### Processing Load Analysis (`outputs/charts/`)
- **processing_time_vs_size.png** — Line chart comparing Pandas vs Spark
  elapsed time (seconds) at 100K, 500K, 1M, and full dataset sizes.
  Caption: "Fig. X: Processing time comparison between Pandas and Apache Spark
  for a groupBy aggregation task at increasing data volumes. Spark's startup
  overhead is shown as a dashed reference line."

- **throughput_vs_size.png** — Line chart comparing Pandas vs Spark
  throughput (rows/second) at the same size checkpoints.
  Caption: "Fig. X: Processing throughput (rows/second) for Pandas and Spark.
  Pandas achieves higher throughput on a single machine; Spark's advantage
  emerges in multi-node cluster environments."

## How to Generate Charts

```bash
python scripts/processing_load_analysis.py
```

Charts are saved to `outputs/charts/` and can be copied here for report use.

## Screenshots for Report (capture from browser)

| Page | URL | Caption Suggestion |
|------|-----|--------------------|
| Dashboard | http://localhost:5000/ | "Tourism Trend Analytics Dashboard — Key Performance Indicators" |
| Sentiment | http://localhost:5000/sentiment | "Sentiment distribution and polarity histograms across 1.48M reviews" |
| Hotspots | http://localhost:5000/hotspots | "Top tourism hotspots ranked by composite hotspot score" |
| Real-Time Trends | http://localhost:5000/realtime | "Real-time hotspot ranking with Google Trends blend" |
| Prediction | http://localhost:5000/prediction | "Random Forest popularity prediction — actual vs predicted scatter" |
| India Map | http://localhost:5000/india-map | "India state choropleth map — tourism hotspot intensity" |
| Spark Analysis | http://localhost:5000/spark | "Apache Spark analysis results and technique reference" |
| Processing Load | http://localhost:5000/processing-load | "Pandas vs Spark processing benchmark across data sizes" |

## Apache Spark Outputs (for report tables)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `outputs/spark_dataset_summary.csv` | Overall stats via Spark SQL |
| `outputs/spark_city_metrics.csv` | Per-city metrics with window rank |
| `outputs/spark_place_metrics.csv` | Per-place enriched via join |
| `outputs/spark_rating_distribution.csv` | Rating counts via Spark SQL |
| `outputs/spark_top_cities.csv` | Top-20 cities after filter+sort |
| `outputs/spark_top_places.csv` | Top-20 places after filter+sort |
| `outputs/spark_state_metrics.csv` | State aggregations via UDF |
